# Support

## Download

Get the latest one-file EXE from [Releases](https://github.com/ShepherdHL/forza-painter-fh6/releases). Normal users do not need the source ZIP.

## Documentation

| Resource | Link |
| --- | --- |
| Quick start | [README](https://github.com/ShepherdHL/forza-painter-fh6#readme) |
| FAQ (workflows, troubleshooting, safety) | [FAQ.md](https://github.com/ShepherdHL/forza-painter-fh6/blob/main/FAQ.md) or [Wiki → FAQ](https://github.com/ShepherdHL/forza-painter-fh6/wiki/FAQ) |
| Changelog | [CHANGELOG.md](https://github.com/ShepherdHL/forza-painter-fh6/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md) or [Wiki → Changelog](https://github.com/ShepherdHL/forza-painter-fh6/wiki/Changelog) |

| Security policy | [SECURITY.md](https://github.com/ShepherdHL/forza-painter-fh6/blob/main/SECURITY.md) |

## Getting help

1. Read [FAQ.md](FAQ.md) for import rules, preset guidance, and common errors.
2. Use **Export detailed log** in the app and attach the log when opening an issue.
3. Open a [GitHub issue](https://github.com/ShepherdHL/forza-painter-fh6/issues) with your app version, FH6 layer count, and steps to reproduce.

## Bug reports

Include:

- EXE version (title bar or startup log)
- Template layer count entered in the app
- Whether FH6 was in Vinyl Group Editor with an ungrouped template
- The exported detailed log (redact personal paths if you prefer)
